thesis_one_liner: Pre-production Western REE/lithium option on Tanbreez (42% Greenland) and Wolfsberg (Austria); value is risked asset payoff, not operating cash.
key_assumptions: 104.9M ordinary shares at June 30, 2025; $7.3M cash with going-concern warning
Tanbreez 44.87 Mt @ 0.38% TREO; PEA ~$3B pre-tax project NPV heavily risked to ~$3/sh base component
Wolfsberg BMW $15M restricted advance; milestone option ~$0.50/sh base
Dilution reserve -$0.50/sh base for Stage 2 (14.5M shares) and GEM overhang
Seven-year Lawrence scenario payoff $4.00/sh vs $6.40 price
open_questions: GEM arbitration outcome and cash/share settlement
Tanbreez DFS and Greenland Stage 2 approval to 92.5%
Fully diluted share count after PIPE, warrants, and Stage 2 issuance
Whether BMW $15M advance enters risked floor when restrictions ease
